login.offEmployeeTitle: You're not on the office network
login.offEmployeeBody: Employees can only punch in from the office Wi-Fi. Your IP will be recorded and sent to your manager for approval — ask them to add it before trying again.
login.noEmployees: No active employees yet. Ask the admin to create one.
login.selectEmployee: Pick your name from the list

me.title: Today — Portside Time
me.justifyBannerCount: {count, plural, one {# incident to justify} other {# incidents to justify}}
me.justifyBannerBody: Explain what happened before the window closes — tap to open.

punchButton.fingerprintUnavailable: Fingerprint unavailable — punching in dev-bypass mode.

errors.fingerprint_mismatch: This browser doesn't match the approved device.
errors.sequence: That punch isn't the expected next step.

schedule.title: My schedule
schedule.subtitle: Week of {weekLabel}
schedule.noTemplate: No schedule template assigned. Contact your manager.
schedule.noTemplateAdminHint: This employee has no schedule template assigned. Showing default split-day pattern. Admin can assign one at {path}.
schedule.busyDayExt: Busy day: end extended to {time} · per diem owed

leave.title: Leave
leave.subtitle: Requests, balances, statuses
leave.pendingCount: {count, plural, =0 {No pending requests} one {# pending request} other {# pending requests}}
leave.formSuccess: Request submitted. You'll get a decision shortly.

justify.title: Justify a late incident
justify.intro: When a punch lands late (or you leave early), the system flags it here. You have {hours}h to explain — after that it auto-flips to unjustified and may count toward the disciplinary threshold.
justify.allClearTitle: Nothing to justify — you're all clear.
justify.allClearBody: Keep punching on time. If something comes up, this page is where you'll handle it.

form.reasonPlaceholder: Explain what happened. Be specific — "traffic" is too vague.
form.successTitle: Submitted. The admin will review and decide.

errors.tooShort: Reason must be at least 3 characters.
errors.notOpen: This incident is no longer open for justification.

pay.title: Pay & Leave
pay.intro: What you've earned, what you've taken. Payroll runs externally — these numbers are information only, not a sanction or an entitlement notice.

rules.salaryBody: Fixed monthly, paid externally. Days not worked are not paid (rémunération calculée sur le temps effectivement travaillé). Not a sanction — just no pay for time not on the clock.
rules.leaveBody: 2.5 days per completed month of service (Article 99 of the Code du Travail djiboutien). Approved annual leave is deducted; sick / maternity / family-event leave is not.
rules.perDiemBody: Owed on busy days when continuous-day employees take lunch on site (work past the normal end). Tracking lands when the busy-day workflow ships.
rules.lateBody: Recorded when you punch after the grace period (default 15 min). Justification flow lets you submit a reason within 48h.

profile.title: Profile
profile.changePinHint: Ask the admin to reset your PIN — self-service is coming in a future update.
profile.languageHint: Choose your interface language. The change is immediate.
profile.notificationsHint: Push + email preferences arrive in a later update.
profile.footerHint: your data lives on the office server · ask admin to review
